|cFF00FF00=== Welcome to Azeroth! ===|r\n\n|cFFFFD700Server Features:|r\n- |cFF00FFFFMythic+ Dungeons|r - Scalable endgame challenge\n- |cFF00FFFFTransmog Collection|r - Build your perfect look\n- |cFF00FFFFGlobal Chat|r - Easier group finding and support\n- |cFF00FFFFPlayerBots|r - Keep the world active at all hours\n- |cFF00FFFFPvP Progression|r - Earn titles as you climb\n\n|cFFFFD700=== Weekend Event: Double XP! ===|r\n\n|cFF00FFFFAdventure all weekend and earn |cFFFFFF00double experience|r|cFF00FFFF on your journey to max level.|r\n\n|cFF00FF00Bring your friends, level your alts, and make the most of the bonus while it lasts!|r\n\n|cFFFF6600Need Help?|r Ask in Global chat and check Discord in the MOTD\n\n|cFF888888See you in Azeroth this weekend!|r
